creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
As Plex.tv as already passed this version from beta (PlexPass) to a release to everyone, I have opened bug #274144 to update multimedia/plexmediaserver for an update to this version.

I have also opened a bug #274145 for updating multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass to the current beta version 1.32.7.7571.

As such, I request this PR be closed.
